data.headline: Miami Luxury, Quietly Done
data.body: I'm Sophie Laurent — a licensed Miami real estate associate specializing in luxury waterfront estates, penthouse residences, and architectural homes across Miami Beach, Coral Gables, Coconut Grove, and Key Biscayne. My clients expect discretion, expertise, and results. I deliver all three.

data.title: What I Offer
data.subtitle: White-glove service for discerning buyers and sellers.

items.title: Private Market Access
items.description: Off-market and pre-launch listings shared exclusively with qualified buyers — many of my finest properties never hit the MLS.

items.title: Luxury Valuation
items.description: Precision pricing informed by waterfront premiums, architectural significance, and the nuances of Miami's ultra-luxury segment.

items.title: Global Network
items.description: Connections to qualified international buyers through partnerships with luxury brokerages in Paris, London, Sao Paulo, and Dubai.

items.title: Concierge Coordination
items.description: From interior staging to legal counsel, I coordinate a curated team of professionals so you only deal with one point of contact.

items.title: Discretion & Privacy
items.description: Confidential transactions for high-profile clients. NDA-backed processes, unlisted showings, and controlled media exposure.

data.title: How It Works
data.subtitle: A refined process from start to close.

steps.title: Private Consultation
steps.description: Share your goals and preferences in a confidential conversation — in person, by phone, or over video.

steps.title: Curated Selection
steps.description: Receive a tailored portfolio of properties matching your criteria, including off-market opportunities and new developments.

steps.title: Seamless Close
steps.description: From offer to keys, every detail is managed with precision — legal, financial, and logistical.

data.title: Recent Sales
data.subtitle: Select transactions from Miami's most prestigious addresses.

data.title: Client Reviews
data.subtitle: What past clients say about working with me.

items.text: Sophie handled the sale of our waterfront estate with absolute discretion. From staging to closing, every detail was managed flawlessly. She delivered a buyer within three weeks at our target price.

Relocating from Paris, we needed someone who understood both the Miami market and international buyers' expectations. Sophie exceeded on both counts. Trilingual, professional, and incredibly well-connected.
We purchased a penthouse in Key Biscayne through Sophie. Her access to off-market listings gave us options we never would have found on our own. A truly elevated experience.

data.title: The Team
data.subtitle: A curated group of specialists for every facet of luxury real estate.

data.title: What's Your Property Worth?
data.subtitle: Request a private Miami market valuation.
data.description: Enter your address below and I'll prepare a confidential market analysis with comparable sales, price trends, and my professional valuation. **Complimentary and discreet.**

data.title: About Sophie
bio: I'm Sophie Laurent — a licensed real estate associate with Prestige Properties, specializing in Miami's luxury residential market. Over 15 years, I've closed 95+ transactions totaling more than $120M in sales, with a focus on waterfront estates, penthouse residences, and architecturally significant homes.

My background in international finance and my fluency in English, French, and Spanish allow me to serve a global clientele with the sophistication and discretion they expect. I don't believe in hard sells — I believe in finding the right match between exceptional properties and exceptional people.
When I'm not working, you'll find me sailing Biscayne Bay, exploring Miami's gallery scene, or hosting dinners in Coconut Grove.

thank_you.heading: Thank You!
thank_you.subheading: Your Private Valuation Is Being Prepared
thank_you.body: {firstName} will send your personalized Miami market report to your email shortly.
thank_you.disclaimer: This report is a Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) and is not an appraisal.
